description: Dashboard mejorado para JVM metrics con Spring Boot OTLP - Monitoreo completo de JBOSS

targets.expr: sum by (host_ip) (process_runtime_jvm_memory_usage_bytes{job=~"$job", type="heap", host_ip=~"$instance"}) / on (host_ip) sum by (host_ip) (process_runtime_jvm_memory_limit_bytes{job=~"$job", type="heap", host_ip=~"$instance"})*100

sum by (host_ip) (process_runtime_jvm_memory_usage_bytes{job=~"$job", type="non_heap", host_ip=~"$instance"}) / on (host_ip) sum by (host_ip) (process_runtime_jvm_memory_limit_bytes{job=~"$job", type="non_heap", host_ip=~"$instance"})

(sum by (host_ip) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job=~"$job", host_ip=~"$instance", http_status_code=~"5.."}[1h]))) / on (host_ip) (sum by (host_ip) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job=~"$job", host_ip=~"$instance"}[1h])))

(sum by (host_ip) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job=~"$job", host_ip=~"$instance", http_status_code=~"5.."}[1h]))) / on (host_ip) (sum by (host_ip) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job=~"$job", host_ip=~"$instance"}[1h])))

(sum by (host_ip) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job=~"$job", host_ip=~"$instance", http_status_code=~"4.."}[1h]))) / on (host_ip) (sum by (host_ip) (rate(http_server_duration_milliseconds_count{job=~"$job", host_ip=~"$instance"}[1h])))

panels.description: Classes loaded, unloaded and currently loaded
panels.title: Class Loading

list.description: The instance of the application, e.g. pod1
list.label: Instance
list.name: instance

title: IDTC-NOC-TCBI-001 - TCIB
